resolution_text: To reset your password: 1) Click 'Forgot Password' on login page, 2) Enter your email, 3) Check inbox for reset link, 4) Create new password with 8+ characters.
issue_description: User cannot login, forgot password, needs reset procedure

resolution_text: Password reset steps: Go to login > Forgot Password > Enter email > Click reset link in email > Set new password (min 8 chars, 1 number, 1 special char)
assigned_team: User cannot login, forgot password, needs reset procedure

resolution_text: Please visit our login page and click on 'Forgot Password'. You will receive an email with instructions to create a new password.

resolution_text: The error 'Connection timed out' typically indicates network issues. Try: 1) Check internet connection, 2) Disable VPN, 3) Clear browser cache, 4) Try different browser.
issue_description: Application shows connection timeout error when trying to save document

resolution_text: Connection timeout troubleshooting: Verify network stability, temporarily disable firewall/VPN, clear application cache, restart the application. If persists, contact IT.
issue_description: Application shows connection timeout error when trying to save document

resolution_text: This error usually means a network problem. Please check your internet connection and try again. If the issue continues, our tech team can investigate further.
issue_description: Application shows connection timeout error when trying to save document

resolution_text: To export data to Excel: 1) Open the report, 2) Click 'Export' button (top right), 3) Select 'Excel (.xlsx)', 4) Choose destination folder, 5) Click 'Save'.
issue_description: How do I export my report to Excel format?

resolution_text: Excel export guide: Navigate to your report > Click the Export icon > Choose Microsoft Excel from dropdown > Select save location > Confirm export. File will download automatically.
issue_description: How do I export my report to Excel format?

resolution_text: You can export to Excel by clicking the Export button at the top of your report and selecting Excel format. The file will be downloaded to your computer.
